findings: Found 2 fresh high-confidence negative/error coverage gaps in install-v2 pipeline stages; both have concrete code branches and no matching tests/registered duplicates.
issues_found: [{"title":"Install v2 HooksStage error results are untested and still reported as completed","severity":"high","description":"HooksStage catches step failures into InstallStepResult objects with status=\"error\" at packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/hooks.stage.ts:134 and :151, collects them into an errors array at :111, but then ignores that array and returns stageRan(\"hooks\") at :117. Registry search found no duplicate, and tests do not reference HooksStage; packages/cli/__tests__/install-v2-pipeline.test.ts covers only guidance/env/store happy paths, so no negative test proves a failing hook/config/bootstrap step makes the pipeline fail instead of showing install success.","location":"packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/hooks.stage.ts:117","fix_direction":"Add a HooksStage unit/integration test that forces one best-effort and one single-step installer to fail, then assert the stage or pipeline returns disposition='failed' with errors; change HooksStage to return stageFailedFromError or an explicit failed StageResult when installResults contains any status='error'.","affected_components":["packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/hooks.stage.ts","packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/pipeline.ts","packages/cli/__tests__/install-v2-pipeline.test.ts","install-v2 hooks/bootstrap install flow"],"perspective":"negative-edge-error-coverage"},{"title":"Install v2 PreflightStage writable and git negative paths are empty and uncovered","severity":"high","description":"PreflightStage documents and calls write-permission and git-availability checks at packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/preflight.stage.ts:40-45, but assertWritable and assertGitAvailable are empty methods at :93 and :98, while assertGlobalRootWritable only assumes an existing directory is writable at :87. Registry/test search found no PreflightStage, assertWritable, or assertGitAvailable tests, so unwritable targets/global roots and missing git for --url are not exercised before later stages perform writes or clone operations.","location":"packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/preflight.stage.ts:93","fix_direction":"Implement the preflight contracts with fs access/temp-file checks for target/global-root writability and a mocked spawn/exec git probe for --url, then add tests for unwritable target, global root as file/unwritable directory, no HOME/USERPROFILE, and missing git returning a failed preflight StageResult.","affected_components":["packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/preflight.stage.ts","packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/store.stage.ts","packages/cli/src/install/run-global-install.ts","packages/cli/__tests__/install-v2-pipeline.test.ts","install-v2 preflight"],"perspective":"negative-edge-error-coverage"}]
